descriptionHtml:
Beneteau Oceanis 48 for sale 2015 | 5 Cabins Version | Tax Not Paid

Very Low Engine Use - 400 Hours - Recent Control Unit Replacement

The Beneteau Oceanis 48 for sale 2015 is a contemporary cruising yacht suited for comfortable family sailing or extended voyages with friends (Solar Panels, Heating, Hot Water, Bow Thruster, Bilge Pumps, Autopilot, Compass...). Renowned for her spacious design and practical layout, this Oceanis 48 is in good condition and has seen very little use, with just 400 engine hours as of July 2022. The low engine hours are due to a recent engine control unit replacement, making her a well-maintained choice for those seeking a modern sailing experience.

Specifications – Beneteau Oceanis 48 for sale 2015

  • Length: 14.27 m
  • Beam: 4.74 m
  • Draft: 2.20 m

Deck & Comfort Features:

  • Sprayhood: Yes
  • Bimini: Yes
  • Cockpit table: Yes
  • Electric swim platform: Yes

Accommodation:

  • 4 double cabins
  • 1 twin-bunk cabin
  • 2 saloon berths
  • 3 bathrooms with showers and electric marine toilets

Galley:

  • Stove: Yes
  • Oven: Yes
  • Fridge: Yes

Engine & Propulsion:

  • Number of engines: 1
  • Type: Inboard diesel
  • Brand: Yanmar
  • Model: 4JH-TE
  • Power: 75 hp
  • Year: 2015
  • Engine hours: 400 (as of July 2022) (control unit replaced)
  • Fuel tank: 400 L
  • Transmission: S-drive
  • Propeller: 3 fixed blades
  • Steering: Wheel
  • Bow thruster: Yes

Navigation & Electronics:

  • Autopilot: Yes
  • VHF radio: Yes
  • Depth sounder (ECO): Yes
  • Log: Yes
  • Compass: Yes
  • Stereo: Yes
  • Plotter: Yes
  • Wind instrument: Yes

Electrical & Water Systems:

  • Voltage: 12/220 V
  • Battery capacity: 460 Ah
  • Water tanks: 3 polypropylene (total 1020 L)
  • Bilge pumps: 1 manual + 1 electric
  • Battery charger: Yes
  • Boiler: Yes
  • Pressurised water system: Yes
  • Black water tank: Yes
  • External shower: Yes
  • Solar panels: Yes

Rigging & Sails:

  • Mast: Anodized aluminium, 2 sets of spreaders, 9/10 rigging
  • Winches: 4 Harken
  • Vang: Yes
  • Backstay: Yes
  • In-mast furling mainsail: Yes
  • Furling headsail: Yes
  • Sails: Original mainsail, headsail replaced in 2021

Tender & Safety:

  • Tender: Yes
  • Outboard engine: Yes
  • Electric anchor windlass: Yes
  • Anchor: Yes
  • Chain: Yes
  • Mooring lines: Yes
  • Life raft: Yes (expiry December 2022)
  • Fenders: 8

In summary, the Beneteau Oceanis 48 for sale 2015 is a realistic option for sailors who want a modern yacht in good condition with limited engine hours, ready for enjoyable cruising. Don't hesitate to contact us for more information or to book a viewing.
